description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a dark metallic slide and frame, complemented by brown textured grips on both sides. The slide features subtle machining lines and a few visible markings, while the barrel is short and robust, typical of compact pistols. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. Two magazines are present, one inserted and one separate, both with flat, dark bases and visible brass-tipped cartridges. The grip panels are contoured for ergonomic handling and display a circular emblem or logo. The overall finish is matte with some areas of wear, giving it a utilitarian and realistic appearance.
description: A compact, dark metallic handgun with brown textured grips and two magazines, featuring a matte finish and subtle markings.
description_view_0: The handgun is shown with both magazines visible, highlighting the brown grip panels and the metallic slide with subtle markings.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the back and top of the handgun, showing the grip's contour and the magazine's flat base.
description_view_2: The left side of the handgun is visible, focusing on the grip texture, slide details, and the separate magazine lying nearby.
description_view_3: The front and top of the handgun are shown, with the barrel opening, slide serrations, and both magazines clearly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is constructed from brown material, likely wood or polymer, with a smooth yet subtly contoured surface for ergonomic handling. It features a circular emblem or logo embedded near the center, and the sides are slightly bulged to fit comfortably in the palm. The grip panels are secured with visible fasteners and have a faint, fine texture that aids in slip resistance without aggressive checkering or stippling. The bottom of the grip is flat, aligning with the magazine base, and the overall design is classic and functional, with no finger grooves or elaborate embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing a robust protective loop around the trigger. Its curvature is smooth, with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and it appears to be integrated seamlessly into the frame. There is no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the design is straightforward, prioritizing function over decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and standard in profile, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. It is flush with the slide and has a matte finish consistent with the rest of the handgun. No external markings or fluting are apparent on the barrel exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle, engraved markings along the side, which may include manufacturer or model information, though the exact text is not clearly legible. These markings are positioned near the front and midsection of the slide, rendered in a simple, unobtrusive style. No decorative patterns or prominent logos are visible, and the overall appearance is utilitarian.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, with slightly beveled edges for easier insertion and removal. It is finished in a dark color matching the magazine body, with no visible finger rests, logos, or additional texturing. The design is minimalistic and functional, providing a flush fit with the grip when inserted.
